markdownRemark.html:
Awesome Imba

A curated list of awesome Imba frameworks, libraries, software and resources

Imba is a programming language inspired by Ruby and Python and compiles to performant and readable JavaScript with build-in transpilers and webpack loader.

Contents

  • Resources
    • Official Resources
    • Toolkits and Frameworks
    • Editor Plugins and IDEs
    • Guides and Tutorials
    • Articles
  • Built with Imba
    • Real World Apps
    • Tools
    • Apps/Websites
  • Contribution
  • Contributors

Resources

Official Resources

  • Website
  • Docs
  • Gitter
  • GitHub Repostars5.8k
  • GitHub Organization

Toolkits and Frameworks

  • Start Imbastars22 - Tool to bootstrap an Imba protect that was inspired by Create React App and Vue CLI.
  • Hello World Imbastars56 - Official Imba "Hello World" example. Also you can use it as GitHub template.
  • Imba Routerstars20 - Experimental router for Imba.
  • UXAstars13 - Experimental framework for Imba.
  • Parcel Plugin Imbastars9 - Parcel Bundler plugin to enable

processing of Imba files.

  • Material Imbastars16 - Material Design components written in Imba.
  • Imba Inertia Adapterstars9 - Imba Inertia adapter.
  • Formidable - Imba Framework for Rapid API Development.
  • Imba Shellstars13 - Interactive debugger and REPL for Imba.

Editor Plugins and IDEs

  • Atomstars2 - Imba plugin for Atom.
  • Sublime Textstars15 - Imba plugin for Sublime.
  • VSCodestars11 - Imba plugin for VSCode.

Guides and Tutorials

  • Official Guide
  • Imba more depth Guide
  • Hello World Imba Tutorialstars0 - This is a detailed tutorial documenting the steps taken to build the "Hello World" app with Node.js, Imba and Webpack.
  • Why is Imba so fast? - Learn why Imba is fast, how it works and then play around with it.
  • Quick introduction to Imba Router - Learn how imba-router works in Imba.
  • Creating a todo-list app in Imba - Learn how to create an app faster and easier with Imba.

Articles

  • An Intro to Imba: the JavaScript-compatible language for lightning fast DOM updates - freeCodeCamp
  • New JavaScript-based Web Language Challenges React - ADTMag

Built with Imba

Real World Apps

  • Scrimba - The interactive screencasting platform Scrimba.com is written in Imba, both frontend and backend.
  • Iceland Fish Auction Market - A website for the iceland fish market.
  • GitSpeak - A project management tool for developers.

Tools

  • html2imbastars5 - view online - A tool to convert HTML to Imba tag source.
  • JSON pretty printerstars1 - view online - JSON prettier.
  • Monoalphabetic Cipher Decoderstars0 - view online - Decoder for monoalphabetic cipher.
  • RegExp Explorerstars1 - view online - Regex tool.

Apps/Websites

  • Imba Todo MVCstars24 - Imba TodoMVC Example.
  • Other Todo MVCstars1 - view online - TodoMVC implementation following tastejs/todomvcstars28k rules.
  • Simple Todostars2 - view online - More basic todo list app.
  • Imba Realworld Appstars17 - view online - Project was created to demonstrate a fully fledged fullstack application that adheres to the RealWorldstars69.5k spec and API.
  • Imba HackerNews Clonestars13 - Demonstration of Imba & Capacitor used to build Hacker News clone.
  • 2048 Gamestars6 - view online - 2048 Game.
  • Calculatorstars1 - view online - Calculator.
  • Emoji Memory Gamestars2 - view online - Memory game.
  • Eyesstars3 - view online - A cool interaction website.
  • Fifteen Puzzlestars3 - view online - Fifteen puzzle.
  • Game of Lifestars5 - view online - Game of life.
  • Matrix Rainstars3 - view online - Cool matrix-like rain animation.
  • Quote Machinestars1 - view online - App that generates random quotes.
  • ROT-Nstars0 - view online - ROT-N app.
  • Snake Gamestars3 - view online - Snake game.
  • Weather Appstars3 - view online - Weather app.
  • Top Down Shooterstars9 - view online - 2D zombie shooter game.
  • Ping CRMstars16 - CRUD app with login, acccount, organizations and contacts management. Built with Inertia, Edgedb and Imba

Contribution

Your contributions and suggestions are welcome anytime. Are you building great stuff with Imba? Feel free to share with us!

Here are instructions. Please read the Code of Conduct as well.
